contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Validated local-LLM to Sophia handoff end-to-end with a demo plan + handoff registry
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/349
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/351
  
  Details:
  Exercised the full local-LLM to Sophia execution-handoff pipeline built today and added the durable referenceability layer the operator asked for. (1) Authored a correctly-shaped (deliberately absurd) demo execution roadmap, SANDBOX_THEOBROMA_1_HANDOFF_DEMO.md, and committed it to agentic_ai_context as the handoff baton. (2) Added SOPHIA_HANDOFFS.md, an LLM-readable handoff registry: each handoff opens its own Telegram topic in TrueSight DAO Ops, and the recorded session_id tg:{chat}:{thread} lets a future local LLM rejoin the exact topic conversation via truesight-dao-ping-sophia --session-id, because the autopilot session key matches on the governor identity. (3) Refreshed Sophia's on-box context clone, then triggered the handoff via the governor-signed ping_sophia: Sophia read the plan, opened topic THEOBROMA-1 (thread 1401, https://t.me/c/3919341801/1401), and posted a deadpan in-character kickoff. (4) Recorded the live topic + rejoin session_id back into the registry. Confirms each handoff spins a fresh topic and that topics are referenceable/resumable by later local LLM sessions.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
